case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC VS. EMILY GEBOE ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEBOE, EMILY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 74 6TH STREET # 329 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CA 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 67515353)
